sn2.20:1.1: Ekamantaṁ ṭhito kho anāthapiṇḍiko devaputto bhagavato santike imā gāthāyo abhāsi:
sn2.20:10.1: Tasmā hi paṇḍito poso,sampassaṁ atthamattano;Yoniso vicine dhammaṁ,evaṁ tattha visujjhati.
sn2.20:11.1: Sāriputtova paññāya,sīlena upasamena ca;Yopi pāraṅgato bhikkhu,etāvaparamo siyā’ti.
sn2.20:12.1: Idamavoca, bhikkhave, so devaputto. Idaṁ vatvā maṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā tatthevantaradhāyī"ti.
sn2.20:13.1: Evaṁ vutte, āyasmā ānando bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: "so hi nūna, bhante, anāthapiṇḍiko devaputto bhavissati. Anāthapiṇḍiko gahapati āyasmante sāriputte abhippasanno ahosī"ti.
sn2.20:13.2: "Sādhu sādhu, Ānanda, yāvatakaṁ kho, Ānanda, takkāya pattabbaṁ anuppattaṁ taṁ tayā. Anāthapiṇḍiko hi so, Ānanda, devaputto"ti.
sn2.20:3.1: Kammaṁ vijjā ca dhammo ca,sīlaṁ jīvitamuttamaṁ;Etena maccā sujjhanti,na gottena dhanena vā.
sn2.20:4.1: Tasmā hi paṇḍito poso,sampassaṁ atthamattano;Yoniso vicine dhammaṁ,evaṁ tattha visujjhati.
sn2.20:5.1: Sāriputtova paññāya,sīlena upasamena ca;Yopi pāraṅgato bhikkhu,etāvaparamo siyā"ti.
sn2.20:6.1: Idamavoca anāthapiṇḍiko devaputto. Idaṁ vatvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā tatthevantaradhāyi.
sn2.20:7.1: Atha kho bhagavā tassā rattiyā accayena bhikkhū āmantesi: "imaṁ, bhikkhave, rattiṁ aññataro devaputto abhikkantāya rattiyā abhikkantavaṇṇo kevalakappaṁ jetavanaṁ obhāsetvā yenāhaṁ tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā maṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhāsi. Ekamantaṁ ṭhito kho, bhikkhave, so devaputto mama santike imā gāthāyo abhāsi:
sn2.20:9.1: Kammaṁ vijjā ca dhammo ca,sīlaṁ jīvitamuttamaṁ;Etena maccā sujjhanti,na gottena dhanena vā.
